compiled_state.title: RED: test --review-tier flag acceptance and enum validation in write-reviewer-findings
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## TDD Requirement
Modify tests/scripts/test-write-reviewer-findings.sh to add tests:
- --review-tier light produces review_tier field in output JSON
- --review-tier standard and --review-tier deep also accepted
- --review-tier invalid exits non-zero with error
- --review-tier with wrong case (Deep, LIGHT) exits non-zero

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] New test cases FAIL (RED) against current write-reviewer-findings.sh (no --review-tier support yet)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-write-reviewer-findings.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL
- [ ] Test assertions are behavioral (execute write-reviewer-findings.sh, inspect JSON output)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written ✓ — 6 new RED tests added for --review-tier flag (light/standard/deep acceptance, invalid/wrong-case rejection)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — This is a RED-only task; no implementation of --review-tier in write-reviewer-findings.sh is required (that is a separate GREEN task)
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — tests/scripts/test-write-reviewer-findings.sh: 17 passed, 6 failed (expected RED failures for --review-tier tests). Other suite failures (Python Skill/Docs: 7 failures, Hook tests) confirmed pre-existing before this change.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — AC2 verified: bash tests/scripts/test-write-reviewer-findings.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL returns success (FAIL found). AC3 verified: all new tests are behavioral (execute write-reviewer-findings.sh, inspect JSON output and exit code). AC1 (run-all exit 0) contradicts the RED requirement — Script Tests suite fails because the 6 new RED tests fail, which is the intended state.
comments.author: Test
